mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 6.5% signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines below 6.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and inflation (CPI) signals supply-side bottlenecks that increase corporate input costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined INDPRO/CPI signal remains above 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20d returns are positive when both series rise.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) indicate strong demand fundamentals that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined HOUST/RSAFS signal shows Rank IC < 0.03 over 2-year windows, or 20d returns are negative despite rising demand indicators.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains (PAYEMS) above 150k signal robust labor market conditions that support corporate profit growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 2.5% signals persistent inflationary pressures that prompt central bank tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) combined with low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) indicates a robust economic expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined GDPC1/FEDFUNDS signal shows Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows, or 60d returns are negative despite strong GDP and low rates.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) coupled with rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates supply-side disruptions that depress corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO/CPI signal remains above 0.05 over 2-year windows, or 20d returns are positive when both series move in opposite directions.
